an1.235:1.1: "This is the foremost, *bhikkhus*, among my *bhikkhuni* disciples in terms of long standing — namely, Mahāpajāpatigotamī.
an1.236:1.1: … Among those of great discernment [*paññā*] — namely, Khemā.
an1.237:1.1: … Among those with supernormal powers — namely, Uppalavaṇṇā.
an1.238:1.1: … Among those who hold the *vinaya* — namely, Paṭācārā.
an1.241:1.1: … Among those with aroused energy — namely, Soṇā.
an1.242:1.1: … Among those with the divine eye — namely, Bakulā.
an1.243:1.1: … Among those with swift direct knowledge — namely, Bhaddā Kuṇḍalakesā.
an1.244:1.1: … Among those who recollect past lives — namely, Bhaddā Kāpilānī.
an1.245:1.1: … Among those who have attained great direct knowledge — namely, Bhaddakaccānā.
an1.246:1.1: … Among those who wear coarse robes — namely, Kisāgotamī.
an1.247:1.1: … Among those resolved in faith — namely, Siṅgālamātā."
